value.found_quote: Preview release 2.0.1 [2] / 19 May 2026; 32 days ago (19 May 2026)
value.rationale: The Wikipedia page on Google Antigravity explicitly lists a "Preview release 2.0.1" dated 19 May 2026, and reference [2] links to "https://antigravity.google/blog/introducing-google-antigravity-2-0". This substantiates that Google offers Antigravity 2.0, though it is currently in preview (not generally available).
